extraction.method: CiPA working-group training set + free Cmax (EFTPC), machine-corroborated against an independent published CiPA source

corroboration.source: FDA/CiPA reference implementation, AP_simulation/data/CiPA_training_drugs.csv (therapeutic = free EFTPC nM; CiPA risk category). Verified against the file when authored.
corroboration.note: EFTPC agrees and the CiPA risk category matches an independent published source; a human has NOT confirmed it against the source PDF, so it is pending_human_review, not verified (spec.md §9).

extraction.notes: Expert risk label and EFTPC from the CiPA training-set literature, corroborated against an independent published CiPA source (see corroboration). pending_human_review, NOT verified (spec.md §9).

notes: Expert consensus risk label is GROUND TRUTH for classifier calibration/scoring only — it is NOT a Harmonia output and NOT a clinical determination.
